title: Inline lichen_dev_iface_init is unnecessary wrapper
description: lichen_l2.c:346-349 — One-line wrapper that calls lichen_l2_iface_init(iface). The net_if_api struct could reference lichen_l2_iface_init directly. Extra indirection obscures call chain.
close_reason: Removed unnecessary wrapper lichen_dev_iface_init, using lichen_l2_iface_init directly in net_if_api struct
